facticity: Confirm the case comes from requirements, acceptance, prototype handoff, and development handoff.
static: Check static contracts, schemas, types, lint, and structure for code paths used by this case.
unit: Cover the core behavior, edge cases, empty state, and error handling behind this case.
redteam: Probe malformed, unauthorized, destructive, boundary, and abuse variants of this case.
e2e: Run or explicitly block the complete user path for this case.
sensory: Review interaction quality, readability, performance feel, accessibility, and maintainability for this case.
